title: Workspace dotenv blocklist omits MINIMAX_API_HOST, allowing host override of credentialed MiniMax requests
description: In src/infra/dotenv.ts the untrusted-workspace .env blocklist (BLOCKED_WORKSPACE_DOTENV_KEYS and BLOCKED_WORKSPACE_DOTENV_SUFFIXES = ["_BASE_URL"]) does not include MINIMAX_API_HOST or the _API_HOST suffix. Because src/agents/minimax-vlm.ts coerceApiHost() reads env.MINIMAX_API_HOST to choose the request origin, a malicious workspace .env can inject MINIMAX_API_HOST and redirect credentialed MiniMax requests to an attacker-controlled origin, leaking the MiniMax API key in the outbound Authorization header.
